previousDeployment.note: v1 (8-field grants), superseded 2026-07-06 by the grant-model v2 audit remediation. Left in place but no longer the canonical default.

notes: Canonical testnet, grant-model v2. Grant struct gains a signed bytes32 `context` (parameter binding, audit finding H-1); PolicyGate adds onlyAllowedWithGrant (two-factor, M-1); two-step per-policy ownership transfer (M-2); example treasury validates its bound policy (M-3); renounceOwnership disabled (L-1). Both contracts Blockscout-verified. Genesis policy #1: metadataURI ipfs://smartpolicy-genesis-v2. See AUDIT.md. Deployed via `smartpolicy-mcp deploy` (embedded v2 bytecode). Fresh keys for any mainnet deploy.
